breaking.summary: Health facilities have come under attack during the current outbreak as a result of misinformation and fear.

breaking.title: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
breaking.summary: The retired couple tell BBC Newsnight they tried to show the warship they had changed course in the English Channel before the shots were fired.

breaking.title: J&K Police Busts Cross-Border Narco-Terror Module, 3 Arrested With Weapons
breaking.summary: Investigators said the accused were in touch with a Pakistan-based drug syndicate and ISI handlers.

breaking.title: India bonds pause oil-led rally ahead of Fed verdict
breaking.summary: Indian government bonds saw their rally pause on Wednesday. Oil prices stabilized, and the US Federal Reserve's upcoming policy decision kept investors cautious. The benchmark 10-year bond yield hovered near a 12-week low. Traders are now awaiting the Fed's verdict. Hawkish guidance could impact foreign investment in Indian bonds. Overseas investors have recently poured over $2 billion into domestic bonds.

breaking.title: Has Sri Lanka recovered from its economic collapse? Three years after the crisis
breaking.summary: Sri Lanka, once a symbol of economic collapse, has achieved remarkable stabilisation. Fuel shortages and soaring inflation have receded, with economic growth returning and tourism booming. While international lenders praise the IMF-backed reforms, significant challenges like high public debt and low investment persist, indicating recovery is still incomplete and transformation is the next crucial step.

breaking.title: Department of War restores U.S. Pacific Command Designation
breaking.summary: It was originally established on January 1, 1947 by President Harry S. Truman

breaking.title: A WhatsApp Text From 'Boss' Costs Company Over Rs 10 Crore
breaking.summary: Delhi Police have arrested four people in the fraud case.
